text: the 'pay yourself first' thing sounds nice until you realize rent takes up half the pie
this. people act like it's a choice between avocado toast or a down payment
it's not about the toast, it's about the fixed costs. most people have no idea what their actual burn rate is.
ok but like... how do you track variables? my grocery bill changes every single week
don't track every receipt. just set a weekly cap and stop when you hit it.
the real secret is an automated transfer the second the paycheck hits. if you don't see it, you don't spend it.
my bank app literally has a feature for this but i ignored it for years
true but what about when the car breaks down and you have zero buffer?
that's why the emergency fund is the first step. before investing. before anything.
